videos.title: NASA Is Testing a Giant Wheel That Will Generate Gravity in Space

videos.description: Scientists designed a giant wheel in space pushed further than ever before! videos.title: A supervolcano that once shook the Earth is quietly recharging
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: A supervolcano responsible for one of the most powerful eruptions in human history is showing signs of renewed activity after more than 7,000 years. videos.title: Why Scientists Still Avoid Exploring the Mariana Trench
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: The Mariana Trench is the deepest known place on Earth - a dark underwater world where pressure is over 1,000 times greater than at sea level. videos.title: James Webb Found Planet We Could Live On - Then Things Got Weird
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description:
The James Webb Space Telescope has discovered an intriguing Earth-like planet located relatively close to our cosmic neighborhood.

videos.title: Jupiter Turns Out to Have More Oxygen Than Scientists Thought
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: Scientists have discovered that Jupiter contains significantly more oxygen than previously believed, a finding that could reshape our understanding of how the Solar System's largest planet formed.
